Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt (confirmed worn during this scene)
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch carried in linen shirt pocket
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: pocket watch described as 'silver vine-leaf pocket watch', shirt described as 'linen shirt', four black ritual spots on hand mentioned explicitly, Khoy University graduation confirmed from diary entry 18th June

Bitsch Mountbatten.hair_style: short with a full brown beard
Bitsch Mountbatten.primary_clothing: Black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform, peak cap with senior sergeant chevrons
Bitsch Mountbatten.face_description: Rough and brutal features, dominated by a thick brown beard and a stern, intimidating expression.
Bitsch Mountbatten.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, stocky build, full brown beard, wearing a black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform and peak cap.
Bitsch Mountbatten.color_palette: charcoal black, stark white, earthy brown, silver
Bitsch Mountbatten.distinguishing_features: Slightly sharp voice with an Awwa accent
Bitsch Mountbatten.source_notes: Described as the street policeman with a brown beard and sharp voice.

Middle-aged Police Inspector.hair_style: short, thinning at the edges of the hat
Middle-aged Police Inspector.primary_clothing: Formal black-and-white checkered police inspector uniform, three silver hexagons on shoulder badges
Middle-aged Police Inspector.face_description: Dignified and stern face with wrinkled, sharp eyes that seem to read minds.
Middle-aged Police Inspector.visual_anchor: Late 40s male, light brown hair, sharp wrinkled eyes, stern expression, wearing Loen police inspector uniform.
Middle-aged Police Inspector.distinguishing_features: Wrinkled corners of eyes, sharp and fearful gaze
Middle-aged Police Inspector.source_notes: Leader of the inspectors, described with light brown hair and sharp eyes.

Gray-eyed Police Inspector.hair_style: short, neatly tucked under peak cap
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.primary_clothing: black trench coat that is shorter than a regular coat, but longer than a jacket
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.face_description: Refined features with a straight nose and deep, calm gray eyes that resemble an ancient forest lake.
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.visual_anchor: male in his thirties with a straight nose and hauntingly deep gray eyes, wearing a black-and-white checkered Loen police uniform with peak cap and three silver hexagon shoulder badges
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.color_palette: deep black, slate gray, ivory, silver
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.distinguishing_features: straight nose, gray eyes with an indescribable depth like a lake in an ancient unvisited forest
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.source_notes: Chapter 10 confirms gray eyes, straight nose, thirties age range, three silver hexagon rank badges, and the distinctive depth of his gaze.
Gray-eyed Police Inspector.unique_identifier: unnervingly deep gray eyes described as a still lake in an unvisited ancient forest, straight nose

Young Police Inspector.primary_clothing: white collared shirt, untucked and unruly
Young Police Inspector.face_description: Handsome, romantic face with a poet's temperament, highlighted by striking green pupils and black sideburns.
Young Police Inspector.visual_anchor: early 20s male with black sideburns, vivid green eyes and a poet's romantic temperament, wearing a black-and-white checkered police uniform with peak cap and two silver hexagon shoulder badges
Young Police Inspector.color_palette: emerald green, midnight black, pale ivory, silver
Young Police Inspector.distinguishing_features: black sideburns, green pupils, good-looking with a poet's romantic temperament
Young Police Inspector.source_notes: Chapter 10 confirms black sideburns, green pupils, good-looking, poet's temperament, approximately Klein's age, and two silver hexagon rank badges.
Young Police Inspector.unique_identifier: striking green eyes and black sideburns, poet's romantic temperament setting him apart from stern colleagues

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text states he 'worked for several years' and 'using the convenience of working at an import and export company, he purchased a brand new gas lamp which was nearly at cost price'

Senior Associate Professor Cohen.face_description: deep, blue eyes sunk deep into his face and he had few wrinkles
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.visual_anchor: late 50s male, pale skin, grey thinning hair, wearing spectacles and a formal grey academic gown
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.accessories: black cane, pocket watch on a golden chain
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.source_notes: Chapter 10 explicitly names him 'Senior Associate Professor Quentin Cohen' — first name Quentin confirmed for the first time.
